answer:
Seth agrees to bring alcohol to Jules's party because he wants to use the opportunity to impress her and potentially hook up with her. He also sees it as a way to improve his social standing and lose his virginity. Additionally, his friend Fogell's fake ID provides the means to buy the alcohol.  

\boxed{\text{Seth agrees to bring alcohol to Jules's party to impress her and improve his social standing, using Fogell's fake ID to buy it.}}
